message:
refactor(interactive): Extract helper methods and integrate theme/glamour updates

Code organization improvements:

- Extract scroll_to_bottom() and scroll_to_last_match() viewport helpers
  into PiApp impl block for reuse and clarity

- Extract spawn_save_session() for async session persistence with proper
  error handling via event channel

- Extract maybe_trigger_autocomplete() and trigger_autocomplete() for
  input-driven completion suggestions

- Extract parse_queue_mode() and parse_extension_command() as standalone
  functions for slash command parsing

- Extract user_content_to_text(), assistant_content_to_text(),
  build_user_message() content conversion helpers

- Extract load_conversation_from_session() for reconstructing conversation
  state from session entries

Import and type updates:

- Update glamour import from Style to StyleConfig (renamed in glamour crate)
- Import Theme and TuiStyles from theme module for theming integration

This refactor prepares interactive.rs for upcoming theme integration work
(bd-22p) by establishing clear helper method boundaries and reducing the
main update() method complexity.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
